012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.

015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.http.header;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts.*;
020
021import java.util.*;
022import java.util.function.*;
023
024import org.apache.juneau.commons.http.*;
025
026
027/**
028 * Base for comma-separated tokens with optional q-values.
029 *
030 * @since 9.2.1
031 */
032@SuppressWarnings({
033   "java:S2160",
034   "unchecked"
035})
036public class HttpStringRangesHeader extends HttpHeaderBean {
037
038   public static final int LAZY_WIRE_STRING = 0;
039   public static final int LAZY_STRING_RANGES = 1;
040
041   private final StringRanges cachedForStringOrDirect;
042   private final Supplier<?> lazySupplier;
043   private final int lazyMode;
044
045   /**
046    * Creates an {@link HttpStringRangesHeader} by parsing the given wire-format value.
047    *
048    * @param name Header name. Must not be {@code null}.
049    * @param wireValue Wire value (e.g. {@code "gzip;q=0.5, identity"}). May be {@code null}.
050    * @return A new instance. Never {@code null}.
051    */
052   public static HttpStringRangesHeader of(String name, String wireValue) {
053      return new HttpStringRangesHeader(name, wireValue);
054   }
055
056   /**
057    * Creates an {@link HttpStringRangesHeader} with the given typed value.
058    *
059    * @param name Header name. Must not be {@code null}.
060    * @param typedValue The string-ranges value. May be {@code null}.
061    * @return A new instance. Never {@code null}.
062    */
063   public static HttpStringRangesHeader of(String name, StringRanges typedValue) {
064      return new HttpStringRangesHeader(name, typedValue);
065   }
066
067   protected HttpStringRangesHeader(String name, String value) {
068      super(name, value);
069      this.cachedForStringOrDirect = value == null ? null : StringRanges.of(value);
070      this.lazySupplier = null;
071      this.lazyMode = -1;
072   }
073
074   protected HttpStringRangesHeader(String name, StringRanges value) {
075      super(name, value == null ? null : value.toString());
076      this.cachedForStringOrDirect = value;
077      this.lazySupplier = null;
078      this.lazyMode = -1;
079   }
080
081   protected HttpStringRangesHeader(String name, Supplier<?> supplier, int lazyMode) {
082      super(name, lazyMode == LAZY_WIRE_STRING
083         ? ((Supplier<String>) supplier)::get
084         : () -> {
085            var m = ((Supplier<StringRanges>) supplier).get();
086            if (m == null)
087               return null;
088            return m.toString();
089         });
090      this.cachedForStringOrDirect = null;
091      this.lazySupplier = supplier;
092      this.lazyMode = lazyMode;
093   }
094
095   public Optional<StringRanges> asStringRanges() {
096      return o(toStringRanges());
097   }
098
099   public StringRange getRange(int index) {
100      var x = toStringRanges();
101      return x == null ? null : x.getRange(index);
102   }
103
104   public int match(List<String> names) {
105      var x = toStringRanges();
106      return x == null ? -1 : x.match(names);
107   }
108
109   public StringRanges orElse(StringRanges other) {
110      var x = toStringRanges();
111      return nn(x) ? x : other;
112   }
113
114   public StringRanges toStringRanges() {
115      if (lazyMode == LAZY_STRING_RANGES)
116         return ((Supplier<StringRanges>) lazySupplier).get();
117      if (cachedForStringOrDirect != null)
118         return cachedForStringOrDirect;
119      var v = super.getValue();
120      return v == null ? null : StringRanges.of(v);
121   }
122}
